stories.title: Ranked: The top 50 players at the World Cup
stories.summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will feature the world's best talent. Let's rank the top 50 players who will be there!

stories.title: Predicting every game of the entire World Cup: All...
stories.summary: Who will win the FIFA World Cup? Instead of predicting a final winner, we've picked every single result.

stories.title: Sorsby granted injunction, eligible to play in '26...
stories.summary: Texas Tech star quarterback Brendan Sorsby has been granted a temporary injunction against the NCAA and will be eligible to play for the Red Raiders in 2026.

stories.title: MSG security tight ahead of Trump's Game 3 trip
stories.summary: Donald Trump's appearance at Game 3 of the NBA Finals brings strict security measures that will require fans to navigate an extensive safety perimeter around Madison Square Garden and an expected lengthy wait to enter the building.

stories.title: Broncos' Cooper pleads not guilty; trial date set
stories.summary: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper pleaded not guilty Monday morning in a Douglas County (Colorado) courtroom to misdemeanor domestic violence charges.
